channel.title: Comments on: Porkslap Pale Ale, Ep. 89
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description:
I was wondering about trying this beer. Now I might go ahead and do so!
and yes Porky's is a classic! lol
item.content:encoded:
I was wondering about trying this beer. Now I might go ahead and do so!

and yes Porky’s is a classic! lol

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description: Thanks for the show guys. Good job!
item.content:encoded: Thanks for the show guys. Good job!
